## Step 2: Generating Samples for Exploration {.nav-proposed}

Find $K$ high-quality and diverse samples for the user to explore. 

With $\pi_w$'s expected performance $f_w = \mathbb{E}_{\tau \sim \pi_w}[\phi(\tau)]$, identify $K$ centers via $k$-medoids.

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: -3em;">
![](images/objectives_3d.png){width="60%"}
</div>
